description: 1-block-high foundation course under the full perimeter footprint (covers whole rectangle footprint as base).

operations.purpose: 1-block-high foundation course under the full perimeter footprint (covers whole rectangle footprint as base).
Continuous white/cream slab railing/ledge around the building at ground-floor level (1 block out from wall is represented as same footprint slab on top of foundation)._outline_face_0

Primary brick wall shell forming two floors: bottom course and top course around interior; leaves room for roof and interior space. This creates exterior wall volume; openings to be subtracted next.
Mid-level horizontal wooden band across long faces between brick courses (replaces that horizontal layer at mid-height to ensure visible band).
Flat roof using white/cream slabs across full footprint at roof height (slab layer).
Small raised central vent/chimney stack (2x1 footprint, 1 block tall above roof slabs) centered on roof.
Glowstone light at roof corner 1 (placed on slab roof).

Upper wall course (top course above wooden band).
